verbatim_text: But at this stage I would say working with fallible LLMs and so on. You know it's less Iron Man robots and more Iron Man suits that you want to build. But this is how I think there's lots of opportunities in these kinds of products. I want to now switch gears a little bit and talk about one other dimension that I think is very unique.
